---
title: "Contact"
---

## René Gempp

**Director, Department of Management**
Facultad de Administración y Economía (FAE)
Universidad Diego Portales

**Email**: [rene.gempp@udp.cl](mailto:rene.gempp@udp.cl)

**Address**:
Av. Santa Clara 797
Santiago, Chile

---

### Academic Profiles

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iWvXzDYAAAAJ)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/rgempp)
<!-- - [ORCID](https://orcid.org/TU-ORCID) -->
<!-- - [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/TU-PERFIL) -->

---

### For Students

If you are a FAE student seeking guidance on thesis projects, research opportunities, or academic inquiries, please send an email with the subject line "Academic inquiry" including your program and topic of interest.
